vocab.example: In my village, communal play was the norm, and we would often gather in the square for traditional games.

vocab.meaning: một trí tưởng tượng sống động
vocab.example: Armed with a vivid imagination, I could turn a simple stick into a legendary sword during our backyard adventures.

vocab.meaning: những hoạt động theo đuổi lúc rảnh rỗi/giải trí
vocab.example: Most of my recreational pursuits involved being outdoors, such as cycling or exploring local woodlands.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi đóng vai đầy sáng tạo
vocab.example: Imaginative role-playing as doctors or pilots was a staple of our indoor activities during the rainy season.

vocab.meaning: sự tiếp cận không bị giới hạn/tự do
vocab.example: Having unfettered access to the vast library at my school allowed me to develop a lifelong love for reading.
My parents enrolled me in piano lessons to nurture my musical talent from an early age.
Board games like Monopoly really brought out my competitive spirit when playing with my older siblings.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy/nuôi dưỡng sự tự lập
vocab.example: Learning to navigate the neighborhood on my own fostered a sense of independence that I still value today.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp thể chất/vận động
vocab.example: I practiced gymnastics because it helped improve my physical coordination and flexibility as a growing child.

vocab.meaning: tạo nên những kỷ niệm bền lâu
vocab.example: Camping trips with the scouts were the perfect opportunity to form lasting memories with my best friends.
